topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Partitioning & Sharding. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Database Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Partitioning & Sharding is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Partitioning & Sharding in a real-world scenario

companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Partitioning & Sharding
